column1: # Agent uses these to construct model inputs and to bound the permutation experiments.
# Start with ~5 foods that cover the most common demo scenarios:
#   - ComBase companion papers (Tarlak 2023 is a good start)

# This is a deliberate scope decision — surface parameters via literature
# Initial log CFU range drives the low/nominal/high permutations.
